title: Mapping AI Opportunity Evaluation for Ethical Policy
description: A flowchart diagramming the key considerations and stakeholder feedback loops for evaluating the ethical implications of AI opportunities in public policy.
elements: Identified AI Opportunity (e.g., predictive policing, automated benefits allocation)
Stakeholder Impact Analysis (Citizens, Government, Private Sector)
Ethical Principles Check (e.g., Justice, Equity, Transparency)
relationships: Informs an impact analysis on different groups
Feeds into the policy creation process
Leads to deployment and continuous oversight
Feedback loop from Monitoring back to all previous stages for iterative improvement
